network_summary: Dr. Dimitri J. Haralampopoulos, DDS is the owner and authorized official across 4 Chicagoland GP locations operating under the consumer-facing brand 'All Star Dental' (allstardentalclinic.com). The NPPES entities (VVN DENTAL PC, SAL DENTAL P.C., VHASH DENTAL P.C., ASH DENTAL PC) are the legal PC shells for each office. ASH DENTAL PC has a confirmed DBA of 'All Star Dental Clinic.' The website lists 5 total All Star Dental offices in the Greater Chicago Area — the 4 in this cluster plus a 5th at 5644 W Roosevelt Rd, Chicago 60644 (not in the current AO cluster). No MSO, management company, DSO platform, or PE backer found. Classic dentist-owned multi-location private group with separate PC entities per location.
owner_operator_identity: Dr. Dimitri J. Haralampopoulos, DDS — owner and authorized official of all 4 NPPES organizations in the cluster
durable_artifacts: NPPES AO 'DIMITRI HARALAMPOPOULOS' shared across 4 distinct org NPIs: 1104112374 (VVN/Blue Island), 1871728634 (SAL/Joliet), 1629203658 (VHASH/Aurora), 1053584599 (ASH/Chicago 60612)
All 4 locations listed on single consumer website allstardentalclinic.com/contact/ with matching addresses and phone numbers
ASH DENTAL PC (NPI 1053584599) has confirmed DBA 'All Star Dental Clinic' per CareCredit locator and WebMD
NPI registry identifies Dimitri Haralampopoulos DDS as authorized official (Owner) of ASH DENTAL PC / All Star Dental Clinic per npiprofile.com
Dentinova UK provider directory links Dr. Haralampopoulos to All Star Dental in Joliet
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: BBB lists 'Dr. Peter Lim' as principal contact — likely a practice manager or patient-relations contact, not the legal owner; federal NPPES AO designation for Haralampopoulos as Owner overrides. The 5th All Star Dental location (5644 W Roosevelt Rd, Chicago 60644 / ZIP 60644) does not appear in this AO cluster — check whether that NPI has a different AO or is unregistered.
evidence_chain: AO signal: DIMITRI HARALAMPOPOULOS is the shared authorized official across 4 separate NPPES org NPIs spanning ZIPs 60406 (Blue Island), 60435 (Joliet), 60506 (Aurora), 60612 (Chicago). Documentary corroboration: (1) allstardentalclinic.com/contact/ lists all 4 addresses and phone numbers exactly matching NPPES records under the unified consumer brand 'All Star Dental'; (2) CareCredit locator confirms ASH DENTAL PC DBA 'All Star Dental Clinic' at 2316 W Madison St Chicago; (3) Multiple provider directories (WebMD, Vitals, DentalPlans, npiprofile.com) consistently link Haralampopoulos to All Star Dental across Blue Island, Joliet, Aurora, and Chicago; (4) Search results confirm 'Dimitri Haralampopoulos DDS is the owner of All Star Dental Clinic'; (5) No MSO/management/PE structure found across full web research.
future_app_notes: Investigate 5th All Star Dental location at 5644 W Roosevelt Rd Chicago 60644 — not in this AO cluster, may have a different NPI/AO or may be a newer location. Check Illinois IDFPR for entity registration of the PC names (VVN, SAL, VHASH, ASH). If 60644 location is in watched ZIPs, link it to this network. BBB 'Dr. Peter Lim' as principal contact is unexplained — may be an older practice that was absorbed or a co-owner arrangement worth clarifying.
